output_debit_classifier.reason: The board has declared a cash dividend of $500,000 that will be paid in 30 days. At the declaration date, we need to record the liability to pay the dividend and reduce retained earnings (equity). This creates a debit to Retained Earnings (equity decrease) and a credit to Dividends Payable (liability increase). The actual payment will be recorded later when cash is disbursed.
